feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: User status update in Equipment Master based on Maintenance Orders
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to auto update the equipment master user status to In Maintenance if any work order/Notification generate. And status should set back to Available once all open Orders  closed.

Can you please share the best way to get this change in the system? Also share any difficulties to take a note handle in this change ?

Best Regards,

Sandy

entry.title: Tables and Fields that build the IW13
entry.content: Can anyone help with identifying the tables and joined fields that build the IW13 (Material Where Used) report?

entry.title: PM order print issue with 2023 upgrade
entry.content:
Previous we are using S4 HANA 2019, with Tcode IW3D (print Maintenance order) shopfloor papers used to be printed. With upgraded to 2023, system is checking for OPD setting instead of shopfloor setting. Is there any setting to change back to shopfloor papers instead of OPD? 

S4 HANA 2023

S4 Hana 2019

Regards, 

Varma

entry.title: Creating BOM from Task List with new Usage instead of Usage '4' within Table STZU
entry.content:
When creating a Task List via IA05, a Material is added to an Operation which creates a BOM in the background.
When you check Table STZU, the 'Usage' is maintained as '4' (Plant Maintenance).
How-To configure this to be another (new) Usage-Type  instead of '4' (Plant Maintenance)?

It has BOM-Type S, can it be linked with this Type?

entry.title: Can i have the SAP transaction to check 7500 equipments maintenance package tick mark verification?
entry.content: We have more than 7500 equipment's in SAP.  How to quickly verify, all the equipment's maintenance package having the tick mark.  Can i have the SAP transaction code?

entry.title: Functional Location and Equipment extract script.
entry.content:
I am new to SAP PM and I am looking to extract the following directly from the database using a SQL Select statements, so that we can undertake a review of the data in spreadsheets.

Functional Locations- Functional Location, Functional Location Short Description, Parent (Superior) Functional Location

Equipment- Equipment, Equipment Description, Parent (Superior) Equipment, Functional Location

Can this be done and can anyone share the SQL syntax to do it please?

entry.title: SAP ECC PM : IW32 released order and change WBS element
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm working on plant maintenance work orders in IW32, there is WBS element in additional data tab but these are empty or false : the orders are released and WBS element is greyed out.

is there a way to change WBS element ( as these are greyed ) ?

thanks a lot.

Best regards,

Romeo.

entry.title: IW32 Shop Paper not Found - Output Control
entry.content:
Hello Experts. I'm trying to configure the Output Management for Maintenance Orders.

I'm using a SAP S/4HANA Demo System

See below the steps that I've made to activate the Output Control

1- Activated the Output Control Object for Maintenance Order

2- Defined the Object Types

3- Made the following form configuration at OPD

Note: I use some standard forms, just to perform a Test.

After this configurations, I'm able to send the print to the spool using Fiori APP "Find Maintenance Orders and Operations".

But if I'm going to use the IW32 to print, I'm getting the Following Error

Is There some config missing?

Thank You Community

entry.title: SAP PM , Maintenance Order iw32- External service
entry.content:
I Have created a maintenance order, and the Control key i have used for operation is PM03, for external services, so i want to know how can i make the GROSS PRICE , displayed in external services tab to be Mandatory field.

i have tried doing it at /nspro >Material mangement>External services mngt> Define screen layout>iw32>prices and cost> Gross price > tick mandatory field.

but i doubt its the correct procedure as it may trigger mandatory for all control key.

entry.title: Tax Jurisdiction does not come up as default in the Maintenance Order
entry.content:
When I create a Plant Maintenance Order, the Tax Jurisdiction is not coming as a default and we have to enter it manually. The code is maintained for all the Planning and Maint Plants in OX10. 

 

Is there some setting that I am missing?

entry.title: How can i add actual cost and planned cost in Document flow of iw32(order)
entry.content:
In IW32> extras>document for orders> document flow . i want the actual cost and planned cost to be displayed in document flow but unable to find in Document Layout , how to resolve. 

i want the document flow to show Actual cost and Planned cost to each operation/component in it,

entry.title: Suppose if new equipment first service 500 hrs nd every service 1500 how to create maintenance task.
entry.content:
- New equipment has a first service interval of 500 hours

- Subsequent service intervals are every 1500 hours

- The first service order should be automatically generated at 500 hours

- The next service order should be automatically generated at 1500 hours (and so on)

entry.title: How can we assign MIC in breakdown maintenance order
entry.content:
Hi PM/QM experts,

I am trying to create order manually for breakdown maintenance through IW31. After doing maintenance work, equipment need to be inspected. Is it possible to add Master Inspection Characteristics against operations in the same breakdown maintenance order?

entry.title: Notification creates into QMEL-PHASE field '1'
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We have recently transitioned to S/4 HANA and encountered an issue with the QMEL-PHASE field in notifications. In the previous ECC system, this field was not mandatory, but now it requires a value.

 

Our custom program, developed using CBO, is creating notifications with the QMEL-PHASE field set to '1'. However, this is not the standard practice, and the phase should ideally be set to '3' (In Progress).

 

I am not certain which BAPI is responsible for creating or modifying these notifications, but I can provide a list of potentially relevant functions if needed.

 

Apologies for any inconvenience caused by the lack of information or grammatical errors in my previous message.

 

Thank you for your assistance in resolving this matter.

 

Best regards,

entry.title: Maintenance Plan Call Dates called earlier than Call Horizon
entry.content:
Hi,

May I ask for help in explaining why the Call Date for the first Call Object line was called when there is a Call Horizon of 45 DAYS? The details of the Maintenance Plan are as follows:

Maintenance Plan created and scheduled : 29.01.2024

Cycle Unit : 1000 HR

Call Horizon : 45 DAYS

Start Counter Reading : 75830 (counter reading when Maintenance Plan was created)

First Planned Date : 28.05.2024

First Call Date : 17.03.2024

Scheduling indicator : 3 - Performance Based

 

What is the basis of the Call Date? Shouldn't it be based on the Call Horizon? Thank you

entry.title: Restrict another Notification/Maintenance order
entry.content:
Hi,

How to restrict another Notification/Maintenance order creation on Equipment If existing Notification/order is in process for same Equipment.

entry.title: Need to enter measuring document in change maintenance order webdynpro app
entry.content:
I Have mapped a measuring point as running hours as a prt tool for a operation in the task list.

when order is created i have to enter measuring document in order itself. is there any way in standard.

because it is appearing only during the confirmation stage.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Create URL Attachment on Maintenance Order using BAPI ABAP
entry.content:
Hi need your help,

my requirement is to create/update maintenance order using custom program and create/update URL attachment as well, i have been searching for a while and i can't find any BAPI to help me create URL attachment at all.

Previously i tried BAPI BDS_BUSINESSDOCUMENT_CRE_O_URL  but it could only create attachment as text not URL, what i really need it URL attachment, whereby when user view list attachment they can directly click and redirect to browser to view the web page.

Please help...

entry.title: Master Data configurations design PM EAM
entry.content:
Hi team, I'm after some help with master data configurations design plant maintenance module 

Is there any documents or text books that can assist with this please 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Data migration issue for functional location task list from ECC to S4 2023 through direct transfer
entry.content:
error :

BOM with cat. [..], number [..], node [..] not found for operation [..]

Error Message
 
Message Class:
CM_EAM_TL_API
 
Message Number:
194
 
Found the below Note but not not S4 core 108
